landing.heroDescription: Discover pickup football, basketball, volleyball and more happening near you today. Join, pay, play — no group chats required.

liveGames.title: Games happening right now
liveGames.subtitle: A live look at the map — this is what's on today.

landing.featuresTitle: Everything you need to play more
landing.featuresSubtitle: GameMap handles the logistics so you can focus on the game.

findNearby.title: Find nearby games
findNearby.description: Browse a live map of pickup games happening around Wrocław, filtered by sport and status.

joinInstantly.title: Join instantly
joinInstantly.description: Reserve your spot in one tap. No group chats, no waiting for a reply.

paySecurely.title: Pay securely
paySecurely.description: Card or digital wallet checkout, clear fees.

trackStats.title: Track your stats
trackStats.description: Season stats, history and reliability, all in one place.

nightSection.title: Real games, every night
nightSection.description: From five-a-side under the floodlights to weekend tournaments — there's always a game waiting for you.

landing.howItWorksSubtitle: From search to kickoff in three simple steps.

discover.title: Discover a game
discover.description: Search the map for open games near you, at the time that works for you.

reserve.title: Reserve your spot
reserve.description: Join with one tap and pay securely to lock in your place on the roster.

showUp.title: Show up and play
showUp.description: Meet the other players, warm up, and enjoy the game.

landing.sportsSubtitle: New games are added across Wrocław every day.
landing.finalCtaSubtitle: Join GameMap and find your next game today.

testimonials.title: Players are loving it
testimonials.subtitle: Real words from people who found their game on GameMap.

items.name: Marta K.
items.quote: I moved to a new city and found a full volleyball crew in my first week. No group chats, just tap and play.

items.name: Tomasz W.
items.quote: Hosting used to mean fifty messages a week. Now people just join, pay, and show up. Huge time saver.

items.name: Julia S.
items.quote: The live map is addictive. I check it every morning to see what's on near me that evening.

items.name: Adam P.
items.quote: Booking a court and finding a partner used to be two separate headaches. Now it's one tap.

items.name: Kasia N.
items.quote: Our running group grew from 6 to 40 people since we started listing runs on GameMap.

details.hostingTipText: Games with a clear title and a friendly description fill up 2x faster. Mention the vibe — competitive, casual, or beginner-friendly.

gamesList.emptyDefault: You have no games yet. Find one on the map and join it.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: We couldn't find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved or the link is incorrect.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.body: By using GameMap, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the app.

usage.heading: Using the platform
usage.body: You can browse, create, and join pickup games. Be respectful to other players and follow the rules at each venue.

payments.heading: Payments
payments.body: Some games need a fee to join. Prices are shown before you pay. Refunds follow our cancellation policy.

account.heading: Account responsibility
account.body: Keep your login details safe. You are responsible for what happens under your account.

changes.heading: Changes to these terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. We'll let you know about any big changes.

collection.heading: What we collect
collection.body: We collect your name, email, avatar photo, and your game and team activity (bookings, payments status, team memberships) so the app can work.

usage.heading: How we use your data
usage.body: We use your data to run your account, show your games, process payments, and improve GameMap. We don't use it for advertising.

sharing.heading: Sharing your data
sharing.body: We don't sell your data. We only share it with the services that run GameMap — our hosting and database provider (Google Firebase, hosted in the EU) and, once online payments launch, our payment processor.

rights.heading: Your rights
rights.body: You can see or change your data any time in Settings. Deleting your account there permanently removes your account and your game and team history — this cannot be undone.

cookies.heading: Cookies and local storage
cookies.body: We only use storage that GameMap needs to work: keeping you signed in and remembering your language and display preferences. We don't use tracking or advertising cookies.

meeting.heading: Meeting other players
meeting.body: Pickup games bring together people you may not know. Meet in public places and trust your instincts.

reporting.heading: Reporting issues
reporting.body: If something feels wrong, leave the game and tell us. We take every report seriously.

venue.heading: Venue rules
venue.body: Follow the rules of each venue, including opening hours and any equipment requirements.

health.heading: Health and fitness
health.body: Make sure you're fit enough for the sport before you join. Warm up and stay hydrated.

emergency.heading: Emergency situations
emergency.body: In an emergency, call local emergency services first, then let us know what happened.

gettingStarted.heading: Getting started
gettingStarted.body: New to GameMap? Browse the map, pick a game, and join in one tap.

payments.heading: Payments and refunds
payments.body: Questions about a charge? Check your Cabinet for game and payment history.

account.heading: Account issues
account.body: Trouble signing in or changing your details? Visit Settings or contact us below.

contact.heading: Contact us
contact.body: Email us at support@gamemap.app and we'll get back to you within one business day.

reportProblem.heading: Report a problem
reportProblem.body: Found a bug or an inappropriate game? Let us know so we can fix it.

twoFactor.title: Enable two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Scan this code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code to confirm.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your account?
deleteAccount.description: This will permanently delete your account and all your game history. This action cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.error: Couldn't delete your account. If you signed in a while ago, sign out, sign back in, and try again.

avatar.title: Choose your avatar
avatar.description: Pick one of the preset avatars below.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.success: Check your email for a reset link.
forgotPassword.error: Couldn't send the reset link. Check the email address and try again.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyDescription: New notifications about your games will show up here.
notifications.sample1Body: Your football game at Rynek 14 starts in 1 hour.
notifications.sample2Body: Your payment for Sunday's game was successful.
notifications.sample3Body: A spot just opened up in a basketball game near you.
